purpose_examples: Purpose We aim to build a better world — helping people live better and renew the planet while building thriving, resilient communities.
Walmart Foundation Walmart.org, through the combined philanthropic efforts of both Walmart and the Walmart Foundation, creates opportunities for people to live better every day.
Today, Walmart.org, through the combined philanthropic efforts of both Walmart and the Walmart Foundation, creates opportunities for people to live better every day.
Learn More Our Work Uplifting all communities is at the heart of our philanthropy.

Creating Opportunity Learn More Advancing Sustainability Learn More Strengthening Community Learn More Center for Racial Equity Learn More Our Impact Learn more about our grantees and the lives we're changing together Show More $2B In FY2025, Walmart.org donated $2.0 billion through cash and in-kind donations globally.
